ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SCOTT BROWN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE PROPOSED CROSS-COMPLAINT MAY BE FILED BY MAY 29, 2018. IT WILL NOT BE DEEMED FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 (302/HEK)

Off Calendar Jun-13-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Michele Miller, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRET L. WONG; Clerk: Maria Olopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Ccp Sections 428.50 And 426.50
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Scott Brown's motion for leave to file a cross-complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The proposed cross-complaint may be filed by May 29, 2018. It will not be deemed filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
